name: Grilled Whole Red Snapper/ Charred Tomato Jalapeno Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds whole red snapper, scaled and gutted
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal grill and allow it to burn down to embers.
2. Rub each fillet with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
3. Grill for 7 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
4. Serve with Charred Tomato Jalapeno Vinaigrette.
